summary: bctx Python/FastAPI evaluation — fixes applied, numbers reproduced and adversarially audited (honest).
fixtures: fastapi/full-stack-fastapi-template (realistic app backend, 20 benchmarked files, 18003 tokens)
fastapi/fastapi (framework, whole repo, 497 benchmarked files, 678886 tokens)

root_cause.coverage_gap: shell hook allowlist did not cover FastAPI dev loop; bare python recorded misleading 0% rows
root_cause.activation_gap: source-compression + memory MCP skills were never auto-invoked; init wrote only a passive skill table

fixes.fix1_coverage_honesty: FastAPI dev servers stream (uvicorn/gunicorn/flask/fastapi/python -m uvicorn/manage.py runserver); no-compressor commands no longer recorded; alembic compressor wired in
fixes.fix2_activation: bctx init installs a mandatory tool-mapping Golden Workflow into ~/.claude/CLAUDE.md + rules/bctx.md (blueprint/chisel/parallax over Read; archivist/sediment memory ritual)
fixes.fix6_doctor: bctx doctor points to benchmark/gain to prove savings
fixes.fix7_benchmark_v0.1.31: removed map (0%-by-design expand mode) from benchmark HEADLINE_MODES; avg_quality_pct now = fidelity of the chosen best mode (matched pair), not a muddled cross-mode average
fixes.deferred: Fix3 shell cat/head/tail routing + Fix4 auto-mode cascade (low value; agents use native Read, not shell cat)

numbers.note: Read savings WITH fidelity. Fidelity = bctx identifier-coverage metric. Token-weighted. Corrected in v0.1.31: benchmark auto_pick fidelity is now the MATCHED fidelity of the chosen mode (was a muddled cross-mode avg of ~73%).

multi_file_feature_read_85pct.note: The number that matters: 5 files to understand the 'users' feature, as signature outlines

honest_headline: Understanding a FastAPI feature (5 files as outlines) costs 85% fewer tokens (3910->569). High-fidelity entropy mode: ~26-39% fewer keeping ~87% content. Lossy signatures outline: ~79-86% (structure only, ~20% fidelity). bctx benchmark's single-file auto-pick (44-63%) is a conservative tradeoff summary, not the headline.

round1.auditor_caught: signatures 86% was conflated with blended 73% fidelity; true signatures fidelity ~20%

round2.result: leads with high-fidelity 44-63%; 79-86% consistently labeled lossy/structure-only

deliverables: PROOF/workflow_demo.sh (session multipliers: multi-file 85%, command compression, code search)
ship_flag: compressor count bumped 110->111; if released, update betterctx.com '110 patterns' copy + bump version + CHANGELOG
